title: Scheduled re-engagement beats at 3 and 6 minutes
principle: Retention sags at predictable points. Plant a planned re-engagement spike — highly interesting content that still fits the story — right where viewers tend to leave.
rule: Place a 're-engagement' beat around 3:00 and again around 6:00 (a reveal, escalation, or surprise). The goal: if they watch the first half, they almost certainly finish.

source.name: MrBeast — 'How to Succeed in MrBeast Production' internal memo (2024 leak)
source.quote: get them to watch the first half of the video there's a very high chance they'll watch to the end
